title: Teoxex's Cave Mushrooms
description: Turns glow lichen into cave mushrooms.
body:
**This is an official update to [Cave Mushrooms by Teoxex](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/cave-mushrooms)**

The original pack broke sometime around 1.20ish.
Of course credit to Teoxex who originally made this pack(linked above)and graciously provided me permission to upload this.
proof of permissions included in the gallery.

**changes from the original pack**
- format updated to support MCs new multiversion formatting
- the models have been completely redone and slightly optimized
- as a happy coincidence this also fixes any z-fighting that happens when a roof and floor cave mushroom are in the same block
- redundant textures have been removed so it now uses 4 textures instead of 7
- emissive textures included. (uses the optifine format for emissives)
- Lang file has been cut down to just the one edited line instead of being a copy of the original en_us.lang file with a single changed line
